title: Quote of the day by Napoleon Bonaparte: "The only victories which leave no regret are…" - the surprising belief of history's most famous conqueror
content:
The daily quote features a surprising perspective from Napoleon Bonaparte on "victories which leave no regret."
*   This belief is highlighted as unexpected given his historical role as a famous conqueror.
*   The headline teases the actual definition of these regret-free victories, implying a less conventional understanding from the conqueror.

title: Over 32,000 traffic e-challan cases settled on day one of fine concession scheme
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Over 32,000 traffic e-challan cases were settled.
*   This significant number was achieved on the very first day of the scheme's launch.
*   The settlements are a direct result of a new fine concession scheme.
